allow: Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 pi@openplotter "echo ''Connected!'' && hostname && uname -a")

Bash(sshpass -p raspberry ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no pi@openplotter 'cd ~/pypilot && git fetch origin && git reset --hard origin/bno && sudo python3 setup.py install --quiet && sudo systemctl restart pypilot && echo ""DONE""')
Bash(python pi_ssh.py "sudo journalctl -u pypilot --since ''20:22:00'' --no-pager 2>/dev/null || sudo journalctl -u pypilot -n 60 --no-pager")
